        <script>
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
                var navRoot = document.querySelector('.portal-user-navbar');
                if (!navRoot) {
                    return;
                }

                function normalizePath(value) {
                    var normalized = (value || '/').split('?')[0].replace(/\/+$/, '');
                    return normalized || '/';
                }

                var currentPath = normalizePath(window.location.pathname);

                navRoot.querySelectorAll('[data-nav-match]').forEach(function (link) {
                    var matches = (link.getAttribute('data-nav-match') || '')
                        .split(',')
                        .map(function (item) {
                            return normalizePath(item.trim());
                        })
                        .filter(Boolean);

                    var isCurrent = matches.some(function (match) {
                        return currentPath === match || currentPath.indexOf(match + '/') === 0;
                    });

                    if (!isCurrent) {
                        return;
                    }

                    link.classList.add('is-current');
                    link.setAttribute('aria-current', 'page');

                    var dropdown = link.closest('.portal-nav-item-dropdown');
                    if (dropdown) {
                        var dropdownToggle = dropdown.querySelector('.portal-nav-link.dropdown-toggle');
                        if (dropdownToggle) {
                            dropdownToggle.classList.add('is-current');
                        }
                    }
                });

                function closeDropdowns(exceptItem) {
                    navRoot.querySelectorAll('.portal-nav-item-dropdown').forEach(function (item) {
                        if (exceptItem && item === exceptItem) {
                            return;
                        }

                        item.classList.remove('show');

                        var menu = item.querySelector('.portal-nav-dropdown-menu');
                        var toggle = item.querySelector('.portal-nav-link.dropdown-toggle');

                        if (menu) {
                            menu.classList.remove('show');
                        }

                        if (toggle) {
                            toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
                        }
                    });
                }

                navRoot.querySelectorAll('.portal-nav-item-dropdown > .dropdown-toggle').forEach(function (toggle) {
                    toggle.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
                        event.preventDefault();
                        event.stopPropagation();

                        var item = toggle.closest('.portal-nav-item-dropdown');
                        var menu = item ? item.querySelector('.portal-nav-dropdown-menu') : null;

                        if (!item || !menu) {
                            return;
                        }

                        var willOpen = !item.classList.contains('show');
                        closeDropdowns(item);

                        item.classList.toggle('show', willOpen);
                        menu.classList.toggle('show', willOpen);
                        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', willOpen ? 'true' : 'false');
                    });
                });

                document.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
                    if (!navRoot.contains(event.target)) {
                        closeDropdowns();
                    }
                });

                window.addEventListener('resize', function () {
                    if (window.innerWidth >= 1200) {
                        closeDropdowns();
                    }
                });

                var collapseElement = document.getElementById('portalUserNav');
                if (collapseElement && window.bootstrap && window.bootstrap.Collapse) {
                    var collapseInstance = window.bootstrap.Collapse.getOrCreateInstance(collapseElement, {
                        toggle: false
                    });

                    collapseElement.querySelectorAll('a[href]:not(.dropdown-toggle)').forEach(function (link) {
                        link.addEventListener('click', function () {
                            if (window.innerWidth < 1200) {
                                closeDropdowns();
                                collapseInstance.hide();
                            }
                        });
                    });
                }
            });
        </script>
        <script>
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
                function normalizePath(value) {
                    var normalized = (value || '/').split('?')[0].replace(/\/+$/, '');
                    return normalized || '/';
                }

                var currentPath = normalizePath(window.location.pathname);
                var pageProfiles = [
                    {
                        matches: ['/UserProfile', '/update_userProfile'],
                        label: 'Profile',
                        title: 'Your profile',
                        subtitle: 'Manage your account details.'
                    },
                    {
                        matches: ['/view_prescription', '/view_prescription_detail'],
                        label: 'Prescriptions',
                        title: 'Prescriptions',
                        subtitle: 'Review prescription details.'
                    },
                    {
                        matches: ['/book_appoinment'],
                        label: 'Appointments',
                        title: 'Book appointment',
                        subtitle: 'Choose a slot and confirm.'
                    },
                    {
                        matches: ['/view_bookedappointment'],
                        label: 'Appointments',
                        title: 'Your bookings',
                        subtitle: 'Check timing and status.'
                    },
                    {
                        matches: ['/invoice', '/invoice_detail'],
                        label: 'Billing',
                        title: 'Billing details',
                        subtitle: 'View invoices and payments.'
                    },
                    {
                        matches: ['/user_viewMedicine', '/user_viewMedicineDetails', '/place_order', '/medicine_payment', '/user_payment_page', '/confirmorder', '/ph_givenMedicine'],
                        label: 'Medicine',
                        title: 'Medicines and orders',
                        subtitle: 'Browse and track orders.'
                    },
                    {
                        matches: ['/chat', '/care-report'],
                        label: 'Care Chat',
                        title: 'Care Chat',
                        subtitle: 'Stay connected with your care conversation.'
                    },
                    {
                        matches: ['/add_feedback'],
                        label: 'Feedback',
                        title: 'Share your feedback',
                        subtitle: 'Help improve the portal.'
                    }
                ];

                var activeProfile = pageProfiles.find(function (profile) {
                    return profile.matches.some(function (match) {
                        var normalizedMatch = normalizePath(match);
                        return currentPath === normalizedMatch || currentPath.indexOf(normalizedMatch + '/') === 0;
                    });
                });

                if (!activeProfile) {
                    var activeLink = document.querySelector('.portal-user-navbar .portal-nav-link.is-current');
                    var firstHeading = document.querySelector('.portal-common-content h1, .portal-common-content h2, .portal-common-content h3, .portal-common-content h4');

                    activeProfile = {
                        label: activeLink ? activeLink.textContent.trim() : 'Portal',
                        title: firstHeading ? firstHeading.textContent.trim() : 'Patient pages',
                        subtitle: 'A cleaner shared layout.'
                    };
                }

                var labelNode = document.getElementById('portalHeroLabel');
                var titleNode = document.getElementById('portalHeroTitle');
                var subtitleNode = document.getElementById('portalHeroSubtitle');

                if (labelNode) {
                    labelNode.textContent = activeProfile.label;
                }

                if (titleNode) {
                    titleNode.textContent = activeProfile.title;
                }

                if (subtitleNode) {
                    subtitleNode.textContent = activeProfile.subtitle;
                }

                var contentRoot = document.querySelector('.portal-common-content');
                if (contentRoot) {
                    Array.prototype.forEach.call(contentRoot.children, function (element) {
                        if (element.classList.contains('back-to-home')) {
                            return;
                        }

                        element.classList.add('portal-surface-block');
                    });
                }

                [
                    // Keep hero panel text intact (no duplicate overlay)
                    ['.portal-surface-block', 'section-animate'],
                    ['.portal-common-content .section-title', 'text-animate'],
                    ['.premium-footer', 'section-animate']
                ].forEach(function (entry) {
                    document.querySelectorAll(entry[0]).forEach(function (element) {
                        if (
                            element.classList.contains('animate-on-scroll') ||
                            element.classList.contains('section-animate') ||
                            element.classList.contains('card-animate') ||
                            element.classList.contains('text-animate') ||
                            element.classList.contains('animate-float')
                        ) {
                            return;
                        }

                        element.classList.add(entry[1]);
                    });
                });
            });
        </script>
        <script src="/static/js/smooth-transitions.js"></script>
    </body>

                        <div class="tiny-slide text-center"><p class="text-muted fw-normal fst-italic">" The advantage of its Latin origin and the relative meaninglessness of Lorum Ipsum is that the text does not attract attention to itself or distract the viewer's attention from the layout. "</p><img src="{% static '/assets/images/client/02.jpg' %}" class="img-fluid avatar avatar-small rounded-circle mx-auto shadow my-3" alt=""><ul class="list-unstyled mb-0"><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li></ul><h6 class="text-primary">- Carl Oliver <small class="text-muted">P.A</small></h6></div>

"</p><img src="{% static '/assets/images/client/03.jpg' %}" class="img-fluid avatar avatar-small rounded-circle mx-auto shadow my-3" alt=""><ul class="list-unstyled mb-0"><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li></ul><h6 class="text-primary">- Barbara McIntosh <small class="text-muted">M.D</small></h6></div>

"</p><img src="{% static '/assets/images/client/05.jpg' %}" class="img-fluid avatar avatar-small rounded-circle mx-auto shadow my-3" alt=""><ul class="list-unstyled mb-0"><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li><li class="list-inline-item"><i class="mdi mdi-star text-warning"></i></li></ul><h6 class="text-primary">- Dean Tolle <small class="text-muted">Developer</small></h6></div>

    <script src="{% static '/assets/libs/tiny-slider/min/tiny-slider.js' %}"></script>
    <script src="{% static '/assets/libs/tobii/js/tobii.min.js' %}"></script>
    <script src="{% static '/assets/libs/feather-icons/feather.min.js' %}"></script>
    <script src="{% static '/assets/libs/bootstrap/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js' %}"></script>
    <script src="{% static '/assets/js/plugins.init.js' %}"></script>
    <script src="{% static '/assets/js/app.js' %}"></script>
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
            var navRoot = document.querySelector('.portal-user-navbar');
            if (!navRoot) {
                return;
            }

            function normalizePath(value) {
                var normalized = (value || '/').split('?')[0].replace(/\/+$/, '');
                return normalized || '/';
            }

            var currentPath = normalizePath(window.location.pathname);

            navRoot.querySelectorAll('[data-nav-match]').forEach(function (link) {
                var matches = (link.getAttribute('data-nav-match') || '')
                    .split(',')
                    .map(function (item) {
                        return normalizePath(item.trim());
                    })
                    .filter(Boolean);

                var isCurrent = matches.some(function (match) {
                    return currentPath === match || currentPath.indexOf(match + '/') === 0;
                });

                if (!isCurrent) {
                    return;
                }

                link.classList.add('is-current');
                link.setAttribute('aria-current', 'page');

                var dropdown = link.closest('.portal-nav-item-dropdown');
                if (dropdown) {
                    var dropdownToggle = dropdown.querySelector('.portal-nav-link.dropdown-toggle');
                    if (dropdownToggle) {
                        dropdownToggle.classList.add('is-current');
                    }
                }
            });

            function closeDropdowns(exceptItem) {
                navRoot.querySelectorAll('.portal-nav-item-dropdown').forEach(function (item) {
                    if (exceptItem && item === exceptItem) {
                        return;
                    }

                    item.classList.remove('show');

                    var menu = item.querySelector('.portal-nav-dropdown-menu');
                    var toggle = item.querySelector('.portal-nav-link.dropdown-toggle');

                    if (menu) {
                        menu.classList.remove('show');
                    }

                    if (toggle) {
                        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
                    }
                });
            }

            navRoot.querySelectorAll('.portal-nav-item-dropdown > .dropdown-toggle').forEach(function (toggle) {
                toggle.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
                    event.preventDefault();
                    event.stopPropagation();

                    var item = toggle.closest('.portal-nav-item-dropdown');
                    var menu = item ? item.querySelector('.portal-nav-dropdown-menu') : null;

                    if (!item || !menu) {
                        return;
                    }

                    var willOpen = !item.classList.contains('show');
                    closeDropdowns(item);

                    item.classList.toggle('show', willOpen);
                    menu.classList.toggle('show', willOpen);
                    toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', willOpen ? 'true' : 'false');
                });
            });

            document.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
                if (!navRoot.contains(event.target)) {
                    closeDropdowns();
                }
            });

            window.addEventListener('resize', function () {
                if (window.innerWidth >= 1200) {
                    closeDropdowns();
                }
            });

            var collapseElement = document.getElementById('portalUserNav');
            if (collapseElement && window.bootstrap && window.bootstrap.Collapse) {
                var collapseInstance = window.bootstrap.Collapse.getOrCreateInstance(collapseElement, {
                    toggle: false
                });

                collapseElement.querySelectorAll('a[href]:not(.dropdown-toggle)').forEach(function (link) {
                    link.addEventListener('click', function () {
                        if (window.innerWidth < 1200) {
                            closeDropdowns();
                            collapseInstance.hide();
                        }
                    });
                });
            }
        });
    </script>
    <script src="{% static '/js/smooth-transitions.js' %}"></script>
</body>
</html>

                                       placeholder="1234 5678 9012 3456" required
                                       pattern="\d{4}\s?\d{4}\s?\d{4}\s?\d{4}" >
                            </div>

                                        <input type="text" id="expiryDate" class="form-control" 
                                               placeholder="MM/YY" required
                                               pattern="(0[1-9]|1[0-2])\/([0-9]{2})">
                                    </div>

    </div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Format card number with spaces
    document.getElementById('cardNumber').addEventListener('input', function(e) {
        let value = e.target.value.replace(/\s/g, '').replace(/\D/g, '');
        let newValue = '';
        for(let i = 0; i < value.length; i++) {
            if(i > 0 && i % 4 === 0) {
                newValue += ' ';
            }
            newValue += value[i];
        }
        e.target.value = newValue;
    });

    // Format expiry date
    document.getElementById('expiryDate').addEventListener('input', function(e) {
        let value = e.target.value.replace(/\D/g, '');
        if(value.length >= 2) {
            value = value.slice(0,2) + '/' + value.slice(2,4);
        }
        e.target.value = value;
    });

    // Limit CVV to 4 digits
    document.getElementById('cvv').addEventListener('input', function(e) {
        e.target.value = e.target.value.replace(/\D/g, '').slice(0,4);
    });
});
</script>

{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<style>
    .bg-dashboard {
        padding: 0 !important;
        background: none !important;
    }
    .section-title {
        padding: 40px 0 20px 0;
    }

<section class="bg-dashboard">
    <div class="container-fluid">
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-12">
                <div class="section-title mb-4 pb-2 text-center">
                    <h4 class="title mb-4">My Prescriptions</h4>
                    <p class="text-muted para-desc mx-auto mb-0">View your medical history and prescriptions from your
                        doctors.</p>
                </div>
            </div><!--end col-->
        </div><!--end row-->

        <div class="row justify-content-center">
            <div class="col-lg-8 col-md-10">

                <!-- Loop 1: Display the List Cards -->
                {% for i in data %}
                <!-- Compact Card for List View -->
                <div class="card shadow rounded border-0 mb-3 overflow-hidden">
                    <div class="card-body">
                        <div class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between">
                            <div class="d-flex align-items-center">
                                <div class="icon text-primary me-3">

static/js/smooth-transitions.js

/**
 * Smooth Transitions & Scroll Animations
 * Keeps the existing UI and only reveals elements that opt into motion classes.
 */

document.documentElement.classList.add('js-enabled');

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const animatedSelector = [
        '.text-animate',
        '.section-animate',
        '.animate-on-scroll',
        '.animate-float',
        '.card-animate',
        '.feature-card'
    ].join(', ');

    const animatedElements = document.querySelectorAll(animatedSelector);

    if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
        const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach((entry, index) => {
                if (!entry.isIntersecting) {
                    return;
                }

                const delay = (index % 4) * 0.12;
                entry.target.style.animationDelay = `${delay}s`;
                entry.target.classList.add('animated');
                observer.unobserve(entry.target);
            });
        }, {
            threshold: 0.12,
            rootMargin: '0px 0px -80px 0px'
        });

        animatedElements.forEach((element) => observer.observe(element));
    } else {
        animatedElements.forEach((element) => element.classList.add('animated'));
    }

    document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach((anchor) => {
        anchor.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            const href = this.getAttribute('href');
            if (href === '#') {
                return;
            }

            const target = document.querySelector(href);
            if (!target) {
                return;
            }

            e.preventDefault();
            target.scrollIntoView({
                behavior: 'smooth',
                block: 'start'
            });
        });
    });

    const heroSections = document.querySelectorAll('[class*="hero"]');
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
        const scrollPosition = window.pageYOffset;
        heroSections.forEach((hero) => {
            hero.style.backgroundPosition = `center ${scrollPosition * 0.5}px`;
        });
    });

    document.body.style.opacity = '0';
    setTimeout(() => {
        document.body.style.transition = 'opacity 0.5s ease-in';
        document.body.style.opacity = '1';
    }, 50);
});
